import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def handle_request_error(request_data: dict, error: Exception):
    logger.error(f"Request failed: {error}. Full payload: {request_data}")

def log_parse_failure(raw_input: str, error: Exception):
    logger.warning(f"Failed to parse input: {raw_input}. Error: {error}")

def log_validation_error(payload: dict, errors: list):
    logger.error(f"Validation failed for payload: {payload}. Errors: {errors}")

def log_response_error(response_body: str, status_code: int):
    logger.error(f"Upstream returned {status_code}. Response body: {response_body}")

def log_batch_failure(items: list[dict], error: Exception):
    logger.error(f"Batch processing failed for {len(items)} items. Data: {items}. Error: {error}")
